title: eryngium rochei
intro: Eryngium rochei, also known as Rock Sea Holly, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its thistle-like flowers and succulent leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Consuming Eryngium rochei is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or dried form for medicinal purposes.
